_meta.note: single source of truth for codex MCP workers; edit here then run tools/gen-codex-mcp.py
_meta.dispatch_contract: EVERY codex call MUST pass model=<worker.model> and config={"model_reasoning_effort":<worker.effort>} from this registry (plus sandbox as needed); per-call selection is mandatory and primary. Generated MCP servers also bake matching startup model/effort pins into .mcp.json as a safety net, verified working on codex-cli 0.144.1 per tools/out/codex-model-pin-test.md. Server names remain routing labels only.
_meta.gpt56_migration: VERIFIED live on codex-cli 0.144.1: per-call gpt-5.6-terra and gpt-5.6-sol both run correctly. Startup -c model/-c model_reasoning_effort pins also work and are baked into generated .mcp.json as a safety net; per-call model/effort remains mandatory and primary.
